messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "05098940-9d57-47ac-9c95-a57e3f4b4fae", "article_id": "afcef673-94cf-47a1-8b92-723d72886717", "source_name": "GQ China", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "campaign_launch", "brand": "Alexander McQueen", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["McQueen 2024秋冬系列形象广告大片", "以伦敦东区为故事背景，形象广告大片捕捉了城市青年叛逆不羁的魅力"], "anchor_json": {"photographer": "Glen Luchford", "stylist": "Marie Chaix", "art_director": "Christopher Simmonds", "brand": "Alexander McQueen"}}, {"event_frame_id": "46b4e5fe-32a3-426f-864c-6e13d0068e1b", "article_id": "afcef673-94cf-47a1-8b92-723d72886717", "source_name": "GQ China", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "product_feature_highlight", "brand": "Alexander McQueen", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["浓郁的牛血色皮革Sling斜挎包紧紧地裹住身躯，与超硬合金T 形扣的闪光形成鲜明对比", "同样的搭扣也系起了乐福鞋面上拖曳的流苏"], "anchor_json": {"brand": "Alexander McQueen"}}, {"event_frame_id": "884c6007-1189-4391-8f87-917e1929e892", "article_id": "afcef673-94cf-47a1-8b92-723d72886717", "source_name": "GQ China", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "creative_director_appointment", "brand": "Alexander McQueen", "person": "Seán McGirr", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["2023年12月起，品牌在创意总监Seán McGirr的指导下持续拓展其影响力", "Seán McGirr为亚历山大麦昆品牌创意总监"], "anchor_json": {"education": "伦敦中央圣马丁学院服装艺术硕士学位", "brand": "Alexander McQueen", "person": "Seán McGirr"}}]}
